response.overview: “Kokrochina” is a Georgian folk tale about a mischievous and brave boy who is called Kokrochina instead of being referred to by his real name. He becomes involved in various adventures, encounters witches and other magical creatures, and always manages to escape danger through his intelligence, resourcefulness, and courage.
response.tagline: A brave golden-haired boy outwits wicked witch.
response.title: Kokrochina
